---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem so it can be reproduced and fixed
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Reproduction
Steps (or a minimal snippet) to reproduce the behavior:

```python
# minimal repro
```

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include the **full traceback** if there is an error.

## Environment
- OS:
- Python version:
- CoRAG version / commit:
- Retriever / LLM provider (if relevant):

## Additional context
Config, query examples, or anything else relevant. **Do not paste API keys.**
